reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The conversion result omits 19 slides (slides 4-7 and 9-23). These pages contain essential information regarding Productivity Tools by Product/Category, Microsoft Teams accessibility features, Accessible Content creation (Alt text, Color contrast, Captions), and Support Resources. This omission represents the majority of the document's content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains 25 slides total, with detailed information on slides 4 through 23.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: In Slide 25 ('Learn More Links'), the output captures the primary headings but fails to include any of the lists or link descriptions associated with those headings (e.g., 'Accessibility Fundamentals', 'LinkedIn Learning Path', etc.). Additionally, Slide 8 omits the sub-heading 'Inclusively embedded within Microsoft 365 Apps'. The loss in Slide 25 constitutes over 75% of that section's information.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Slide 25 lists: 'Accessibility Fundamentals', 'Accessibility guide for M365 apps', 'Accessibility by design | Microsoft Docs', 'Accessibility - Windows apps | Microsoft Docs', etc.
concerns.output_quote: The 'elements' array for the section containing 'Learn More Links' contains only heading objects and an image, with no list or paragraph objects for the link items.

concerns.analysis: Numerous meaningful and illustrative images from the source PDF are completely missing in the HTML output. This includes screenshots of the Accessibility Assistant (pages 10 and 17), the illustrative photo for Alt Text (page 11), color contrast examples (page 12), video caption examples (page 13), Teams status icons (page 14), and the Clippy GIF (page 16). These images are central to the educational purpose of the document and their absence is a major fidelity failure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains meaningful images on pages 10 (3 screenshots), 11 (photo), 12 (3 examples), 13 (TED talk screenshot), 14 (Teams icons), 15 (web screenshot), 16 (Clippy GIF), and 17 (3 SharePoint screenshots).
concerns.output_quote: The HTML rendering is missing all of the illustrative images and screenshots present in the PDF, showing only the text associated with those sections.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
